error_patterns.description_cn: 冠词遗漏：中文无冠词概念，学习者常遗漏不定冠词 a/an 或定冠词 the

typical_examples.correct: He gave me an interesting book.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 每次写作后专门检查每个名词前是否需要冠词，建立冠词检查清单

error_patterns.description_cn: 主谓一致错误：第三人称单数忘加 -s 或复数主语误用单数动词

typical_examples.incorrect: He go to school every day.
typical_examples.correct: He goes to school every day.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 写作完成后逐句检查主语和动词的一致性

error_patterns.description_cn: 流水句/逗号拼接：用逗号直接连接两个完整句子，缺少适当的连词或分号

typical_examples.incorrect: I like reading, it helps me relax.
typical_examples.correct: I like reading, and it helps me relax.

typical_examples.incorrect: The weather was bad, we stayed home.
typical_examples.correct: The weather was bad, so we stayed home.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 检查每个逗号前后是否为完整句子；若是则添加连词或改用分号

error_patterns.description_cn: 跑题/偏离主题：未完整回应题目要求的所有要点

typical_examples.incorrect: 题目要求讨论利弊，但只写了利
typical_examples.correct: 需要分别讨论利弊并给出个人观点

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 写作前列出题目要求的所有要点，写完后逐项检查是否覆盖

error_patterns.description_cn: 时态混用：一段文字中时态前后不一致

typical_examples.incorrect: Yesterday I go to the park and played basketball.
typical_examples.correct: Yesterday I went to the park and played basketball.

typical_examples.note_cn: 明确过去时间不用现在完成时

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 确定全文的时间基准后再动笔，完成后统一检查时态

error_patterns.description_cn: 中式英语（Chinglish）：逐字翻译中文思维，不符合英语表达习惯

typical_examples.note_cn: very 修饰 like 不当

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 多读英语原文，积累地道表达；避免从中文逐词翻译
